description.ko: ECHO-0가 보이지 않는 음파를 빛과 움직임의 숨막히는 풍경으로 변환하는 음향 기하학의 심장부로의 여정입니다.
description.en: A journey into the heart of sonic geometry, where ECHO-0 transforms invisible audio waves into a breathtaking landscape of light and movement.

prompt: Cinematic 3D render of ECHO-0 robot center frame, emanating concentric holographic rings and vibrant waveform patterns, visualizing complex audio frequencies in a dark futuristic laboratory, bioluminescent pulses of blue and cyan, intricate glass textures, 8k resolution, octane render, synthwave lighting.
